pages.title: Blood Arsenal
pages.text: Blood Magic answers the question of $(italic)power$(). Blood Arsenal answers the question of $(italic)what to do with it$().$(br2)Its three pillars are $(l:bloodmagic:soa_additions_ba/altare)Sanguine Infusion$(), $(l:bloodmagic:soa_additions_ba/modifiers)Stasis Modifiers$(), and $(l:bloodmagic:soa_additions_ba/rituals)new Rituals$(). Every content entry in this category builds on one of those three.

pages.title: Prerequisites
pages.text: Most content requires an established $(l:bloodmagic:altar)Blood Altar$() and an active $(l:bloodmagic:altar/soul_network)Soul Network$(). A handful of items — notably $(l:bloodmagic:soa_additions_ba/glass)Glass Shards$() and $(item)Blood-Infused Iron$() — bootstrap the progression.$(br2)This book documents the addon's content but does not replicate core Blood Magic mechanics; follow the main chapters of the $(item)Sanguine Scientium$() first.
